item.title: This Chickpea Sandwich Slaps
item.description: The best sandwich you've seen in a while

media:content.media:title: This Chickpea Sandwich Slaps
media:content.media:description: The best sandwich you've seen in a while

item.title: The Best Strawberry Layer Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
item.description: This Strawberry Layer Cake is soft, fluffy, and packed with real strawberry flavor thanks to roasting the berries and a generous dose of their freeze-dried form. It’s a beautiful make-ahead cake that feels special without being overly complicated.

media:content.media:title: The Best Strawberry Layer Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
media:content.media:description: This Strawberry Layer Cake is soft, fluffy, and packed with real strawberry flavor thanks to roasting the berries and a generous dose of their freeze-dried form. It’s a beautiful make-ahead cake that feels special without being overly complicated.

item.title: The Ultimate Vegetarian Nachos
item.description: These vegiterian nachos are so easy to make and will be your new favorite appetizer

media:content.media:title: The Ultimate Vegetarian Nachos
media:content.media:description: These vegiterian nachos are so easy to make and will be your new favorite appetizer

item.title: Delicious Custard French Toast with Macerated Strawberries
item.description: This Custard French Toast with Macerated Strawberries is the most delicious weekend breakfast. Making a custard–which can be made ahead–elevates this breakfast favorite into something magical!

media:content.media:title: Delicious Custard French Toast with Macerated Strawberries
media:content.media:description: This Custard French Toast with Macerated Strawberries is the most delicious weekend breakfast. Making a custard–which can be made ahead–elevates this breakfast favorite into something magical!

item.title: Watermelon, But Make It a Margarita
item.description: Save this for the hottest nights and the quickest happy hour.

media:content.media:title: Watermelon, But Make It a Margarita
media:content.media:description: Save this for the hottest nights and the quickest happy hour.

item.title: My Favorite Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
item.description: Welcome to my favorite Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies. These cookies have a deep, nutty flavor to them; they’re made with two types of chocolate, chopped walnuts (optional!) and flakey sea salt on top. Their texture is perfection: crispy edges with soft and chewy centers–yum!

media:content.media:title: My Favorite Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
media:content.media:description: Welcome to my favorite Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies. These cookies have a deep, nutty flavor to them; they’re made with two types of chocolate, chopped walnuts (optional!) and flakey sea salt on top. Their texture is perfection: crispy edges with soft and chewy centers–yum!

item.description: I peaked with this sandwich recipe

media:content.media:title: The Most Delicious Grinder Sandwich Ever
media:content.media:description: I peaked with this sandwich recipe

item.title: Duvalin Jello? I’m Obsessed
item.description: A chilled dessert that turns a childhood favorite into the prettiest spoonful.

media:content.media:title: Duvalin Jello? I’m Obsessed
media:content.media:description: A chilled dessert that turns a childhood favorite into the prettiest spoonful.

item.title: This is the Best Caesar Salad
item.description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.

media:content.media:title: This is the Best Caesar Salad
media:content.media:description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.

item.title: The Tiramisu That Melts In Your Mouth
item.description: One bite and you’ll get why this one never lasts long.

media:content.media:title: The Tiramisu That Melts In Your Mouth
media:content.media:description: One bite and you’ll get why this one never lasts long.

item.title: The Best Dessert, Tiramisu Affogato
item.description: The Best Dessert, Tiramisu Affogato

media:content.media:title: The Best Dessert, Tiramisu Affogato
media:content.media:description: The Best Dessert, Tiramisu Affogato

item.title: Bang Bang Shrimp Po’ Boy Recipe
item.description: This Bang Bang Shrimp appetizer is crispy, fried shrimp tossed in a creamy, spicy and slightly sweet sauce and served with a crunchy refreshing cabbage slaw. Make it for an appetizer or serve with steamed rice to make it an entree.

media:content.media:title: Bang Bang Shrimp Po’ Boy Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Bang Bang Shrimp appetizer is crispy, fried shrimp tossed in a creamy, spicy and slightly sweet sauce and served with a crunchy refreshing cabbage slaw. Make it for an appetizer or serve with steamed rice to make it an entree.

item.title: The Crunchy Sandwich I Keep Reaching For
item.description: Roasted red pepper hummus makes every bite feel extra special.

media:content.media:title: The Crunchy Sandwich I Keep Reaching For
media:content.media:description: Roasted red pepper hummus makes every bite feel extra special.

item.title: The secret to crispy wings
item.description: A little spicy, super lime-y and delicious sweet, these Hot Honey Lime Wings are the perfect weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: The secret to crispy wings
media:content.media:description: A little spicy, super lime-y and delicious sweet, these Hot Honey Lime Wings are the perfect weeknight meal.

item.title: Your New Go-To Taco Recipe
item.description: These Ground Beef Tacos are easy and delicious. Filled flavorful ground beef that’s been sautéed with a homemade taco seasoning and stuffed in homemade crunchy taco shells. Feel free to swap them in for store-bought or soft shell tacos for an easy weeknight meal!

media:content.media:title: Your New Go-To Taco Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Ground Beef Tacos are easy and delicious. Filled flavorful ground beef that’s been sautéed with a homemade taco seasoning and stuffed in homemade crunchy taco shells. Feel free to swap them in for store-bought or soft shell tacos for an easy weeknight meal!

item.title: Bakery-Style Carrot Cake, So Easy
item.description: This is the best carrot cake that’s moist, tender, packed with crunchy walnuts, fresh shaved carrots and warm spices. Topped with a luscious brown butter cream cheese frosting that adds a nutty flavor—truly the ultimate carrot cake experience for Easter or any Spring brunch.

media:content.media:title: Bakery-Style Carrot Cake, So Easy
media:content.media:description: This is the best carrot cake that’s moist, tender, packed with crunchy walnuts, fresh shaved carrots and warm spices. Topped with a luscious brown butter cream cheese frosting that adds a nutty flavor—truly the ultimate carrot cake experience for Easter or any Spring brunch.

item.title: The Tuna Melt That Gets the Chips
item.description: A tiny crunchy upgrade makes this the one people ask for again.

item.title: Quick and Easy Meatball Sandwich
item.description: Nothing cozier than a warm meatball sub sandwich #recipe #lunchideas #delicious

media:content.media:title: Quick and Easy Meatball Sandwich
media:content.media:description: Nothing cozier than a warm meatball sub sandwich #recipe #lunchideas #delicious

item.title: The Quickest Weeknight Meal
item.description: This Cacio e Pepe Macaroni and Cheese recipe is a mash-up between the classic Italian pasta, Cacio e Pepe and stovetop macaroni and cheese. This is a quick weeknight meal that has fragrant toasted black peppercorns, lots of in a cheesy sauce.

media:content.media:title: The Quickest Weeknight Meal
media:content.media:description: This Cacio e Pepe Macaroni and Cheese recipe is a mash-up between the classic Italian pasta, Cacio e Pepe and stovetop macaroni and cheese. This is a quick weeknight meal that has fragrant toasted black peppercorns, lots of in a cheesy sauce.
